languages.text: {n}Вы выпиваете жидкость залпом. Смесь оставляет мерзкое химическое послевкусие на языке, а желудок скручивается узлом, но вы удерживаете все внутри, гордо поставив опустошенный кубок на край купальни.{/n}

{n}You drink the liquid in a gulp. The mixture leaves an unpleasant chemical aftertaste on your tongue, and your stomach twists in knots, but you hold it all in, proudly placing the emptied goblet on the edge of the bath.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Вы выпиваете жидкость залпом. Смесь оставляет мерзкое химическое послевкусие на языке, а желудок скручивается узлом, но вы удерживаете все внутри, гордо поставив опустошенный кубок на край купальни.{/n}

{n}You drink the liquid in a gulp. The mixture leaves an unpleasant chemical aftertaste on your tongue, and your stomach twists in knots, but you hold it all in, proudly placing the emptied goblet on the edge of the bath.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Apuras la copa de un solo trago. El bebedizo te deja un asqueroso sabor químico en la lengua y te revuelve las tripas, pero resistes el impulso de vomitarlo y depositas con orgullo el cáliz vacío en el borde de la bañera.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You drink the liquid in a gulp. The mixture leaves an unpleasant chemical aftertaste on your tongue, and your stomach twists in knots, but you hold it all in, proudly placing the emptied goblet on the edge of the bath.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Apuras la copa de un solo trago. El bebedizo te deja un asqueroso sabor químico en la lengua y te revuelve las tripas, pero resistes el impulso de vomitarlo y depositas con orgullo el cáliz vacío en el borde de la bañera.{/n}

languages.text: {n}你将那液体一饮而尽。那混合物在你的舌头上留下了难以忍受的化学余味，胃里也一阵翻江倒海，但你生生压下了所有不适，骄傲地将空杯子放在浴缸边。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You drink the liquid in a gulp. The mixture leaves an unpleasant chemical aftertaste on your tongue, and your stomach twists in knots, but you hold it all in, proudly placing the emptied goblet on the edge of the bath.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}你将那液体一饮而尽。那混合物在你的舌头上留下了难以忍受的化学余味，胃里也一阵翻江倒海，但你生生压下了所有不适，骄傲地将空杯子放在浴缸边。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Vous videz votre verre d'une gorgée. La mixture a un arrière-goût chimique déplaisant et votre estomac se révolte, mais vous parvenez à ne pas la recracher et posez fièrement le verre vide sur le rebord du bain.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You drink the liquid in a gulp. The mixture leaves an unpleasant chemical aftertaste on your tongue, and your stomach twists in knots, but you hold it all in, proudly placing the emptied goblet on the edge of the bath.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Vous videz votre verre d'une gorgée. La mixture a un arrière-goût chimique déplaisant et votre estomac se révolte, mais vous parvenez à ne pas la recracher et posez fièrement le verre vide sur le rebord du bain.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Sıvıyı bir dikişte içiyorsun. Karışım dilinde nahoş, kimyasal bir tat bırakıyor ve miden düğümleniyor. Yine de hepsini içinde tutarak boşalan kadehi gururla kenara koyuyorsun.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You drink the liquid in a gulp. The mixture leaves an unpleasant chemical aftertaste on your tongue, and your stomach twists in knots, but you hold it all in, proudly placing the emptied goblet on the edge of the bath.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Sıvıyı bir dikişte içiyorsun. Karışım dilinde nahoş, kimyasal bir tat bırakıyor ve miden düğümleniyor. Yine de hepsini içinde tutarak boşalan kadehi gururla kenara koyuyorsun.{/n}

languages.text: {n}あなたは液体を一気に飲み干す。その混合物は舌に不快な化学的後味を残し、胃がきりきりとよじれるが、あなたはすべてをこらえ、空になった酒杯を誇らしげに浴槽の縁に置いた。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You drink the liquid in a gulp. The mixture leaves an unpleasant chemical aftertaste on your tongue, and your stomach twists in knots, but you hold it all in, proudly placing the emptied goblet on the edge of the bath.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}あなたは液体を一気に飲み干す。その混合物は舌に不快な化学的後味を残し、胃がきりきりとよじれるが、あなたはすべてをこらえ、空になった酒杯を誇らしげに浴槽の縁に置いた。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Du trinkst die Flüssigkeit in einem Zug aus. Die Mixtur hinterlässt einen unangenehmen chemischen Nachgeschmack auf der Zunge und dein Magen rebelliert, aber du unterdrückst deinen Brechreiz und stellst den leeren Kelch stolz an den Rand der Badewanne.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You drink the liquid in a gulp. The mixture leaves an unpleasant chemical aftertaste on your tongue, and your stomach twists in knots, but you hold it all in, proudly placing the emptied goblet on the edge of the bath.{/n}
